records.ety: [From the first words of the Roman Catholic prayer to the Virgin Mary; L. ave hail, Maria Mary.]

defs: A salutation and prayer to the Virgin Mary, as mother of God; -- used in the Roman Catholic church.
quotes: To number Ave Maries on his beads.

defs: A particular time (as in Italy, at the ringing of the bells about half an hour after sunset, and also at early dawn), when the people repeat the Ave Maria.
quotes: Ave Maria ! blessed be the hour !
